project_type: Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) Compose application with Desktop and Android targets
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew desktopTest and confirm all tests pass. The project does not have a Dockerfile.
setup_instructions: Project uses Gradle wrapper. Run ./gradlew desktopTest from /projects/sandbox/GAIME/
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. No expect/actual pattern currently exists in the project. Desktop uses javax.sound.sampled, Android uses MediaPlayer.
contribution_requirements: Continue on feat/bark-audio-system branch. Tests in commonTest.
key_patterns: BarkEvent enum (59 values) -> BarkEventBus (cooldowns) -> QuestbookProcessor -> SliceDirector orchestrates all. CombatEngine emits CombatEvent.BarkTriggered for barks. SliceDirector.handleCombatEvents processes them via fireBark(). BarkAudioPlayer wraps AudioPlayer interface. SliceScreen is a Composable in commonMain that creates SliceDirector.
directory_structure: composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/ - shared code; composeApp/src/desktopMain/kotlin/ - JVM desktop; composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/ - Android; composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/ - shared tests
